description_long: This is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a matte black finish and a striking grip adorned with a detailed skull motif. The frame and slide are constructed from metal, with a green accent line running along the slide, adding a unique visual element. The grip is ergonomically contoured and features a cluster of sculpted skulls, providing both texture and a distinctive appearance. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, offering ample space for finger placement and control. The barrel is standard length, with no visible threading or compensator, and the magazine base is flat and flush with the grip. No visible manufacturer markings or serial numbers are present on the slide, emphasizing the custom aesthetic of the weapon.
description: A matte black semi-automatic handgun with a sculpted skull-patterned grip and a green accent on the slide. The design is modern and visually striking, with a custom, textured grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the skull-embellished grip, green slide accent, and overall sleek black finish.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, front sight, and the green accent line along the slide.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the skull-patterned grip and the clean, unmarked slide.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the hammer, rear sight, and the contoured grip with skull detailing.
attribute_grip_design: The grip features a highly detailed, sculpted skull motif that covers its entire surface, providing a textured and visually dramatic appearance. It is contoured for ergonomic handling, with subtle finger grooves and a slightly flared base for improved control. The material appears to be a durable polymer or composite, finished in matte black with the skulls rendered in a slightly lighter gray. No logos or manufacturer marks are visible, and the grip's unique embellishment serves as its primary distinguishing feature.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, offering a robust and protective enclosure for the trigger. It is smoothly contoured with no visible undercuts or squared-off edges, and lacks any additional texturing or integrated accessories. The design is functional and standard, prioritizing comfort and safety.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length and profile, with a smooth, unadorned exterior and no visible threading, porting, or compensator. It is finished in matte black, matching the rest of the handgun, and does not display any external markings or unique features.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, caliber designations, or decorative engravings on the slide. The slide is clean and unmarked, with the only visual accent being the green line running along its length.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with no extension, bevel, or flaring. It appears smooth and untextured, lacking finger rests, logos, or other distinguishing features.
